prerequisites: A SurveySparrow account with access to Settings and the Apps & Integrations area (required to create a Private App and generate an access token).
A Private App created under Settings -> Apps & Integrations, with the scopes needed to read the data you want to extract.
An access token generated for that Private App (this maps to the connector's required `access_token` field). The token is shown only once at creation, so copy it immediately.
Knowledge of which SurveySparrow data center hosts your account, so you can set the optional `region` field (US, EU, AP, ME, UK, Sydney, or Canada). US is the default base URL.
Optionally, the `survey_id` of a specific survey if you want to scope extraction to a single survey rather than the whole account.

authMethods.name: Access token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: SurveySparrow authenticates API requests with an access token generated from a Private App. Supply it in the connector's `access_token` field; pm sends it as the `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` header. SurveySparrow also accepts the token as an `access_token` query parameter. Create the token under Settings -> Apps & Integrations -> Create a Private App, where you set a name, description, and scopes. The token is displayed only once, so store it securely; regenerate it if lost.

setupSteps.title: Create a Private App in SurveySparrow
setupSteps.body: Sign in to SurveySparrow and go to Settings -> Apps & Integrations, then choose Create a Private App. Enter a name and description, and select the scopes that cover the resources you plan to extract.

setupSteps.title: Generate and copy the access token
setupSteps.body: Generate the access token for the Private App. Copy it immediately and store it somewhere safe, because SurveySparrow displays the token only once. If you lose it, you must regenerate a new token. Provide this value as the connector's required `access_token` field.

setupSteps.title: Set the region to match your data center
setupSteps.body: Set the optional `region` field to the SurveySparrow data center hosting your account so requests target the correct base URL: US (https://api.surveysparrow.com/), EU (https://eu-api.surveysparrow.com/), AP (https://ap-api.surveysparrow.com/), ME (https://me-api.surveysparrow.com/), UK (https://eu-ln-api.surveysparrow.com/), Sydney, or Canada (https://ca-api.surveysparrow.com/). If left unset, the US base URL is used.

setupSteps.title: Optionally scope to a single survey
setupSteps.body: If you only need data from one survey, set the optional `survey_id` field to that survey's identifier. Leave it empty to extract across surveys your token's scopes permit.

sources.title: SurveySparrow REST APIs - Introduction (base URLs, access token auth, regional data centers)
